original: The glowing hydra is big for a zaika, reaching nearly seven feet tall. Huge, fluffy pigtails frame her head with vibrant colors. The large, circular glasses perched on the brim of her nose are fogged over, blocking your view of her eyes. Her purple-black skin is bisected by stylish glowing tattoo lines that make her look like a rave girl. Her clothing is skimpy and brightly colored, while a variety of bracelets and rings deck her arms and ears. The hydra’s tail is split into two near the extremity of its length. Both footlong tips are turgid and spurting lustrous blue-white jizz despite all her efforts to stop the leak.
You duck the embrace, evading her grasp like you would an over-enthusiastic groupie.

Long, lean arms wrap around your body, pinning yours to your ribs in a monster of a bear hug! She presses impassioned kisses against any part of your body she can reach as she squirms against you."+(t?" Luckily your airtight suit prevents any extra adverse effects from her being so close to you.":" The heat of her body and scent of her desire floods your senses and your better judgment.")
\n\nYou are grappled! You might want to break free...
